name: Sarah Johnson
text: Umer is truly amazing and is a great WordPress expert. He quickly understood our requirements, delivered excellent work ahead of schedule, and has been supportive throughout. Highly recommended!

name: Michael Chen
text: Excellent work on the WordPress mobile menu fix. Umer quickly diagnosed the issue, implemented a clean solution, and ensured full responsiveness across mobile and tablet without breaking existing functionality. Clear communicator too.

name: Emma Watson
text: Professional, reliable, and detail-oriented. Umer delivered the custom WordPress theme exactly as we envisioned it. The site is fast, responsive, and easy to manage. Perfect for our needs!

name: James Rodriguez
text: Built our custom MERN application from scratch. Umer understood the requirements perfectly and delivered a scalable, high-performance solution. Communication was excellent throughout.

name: Lisa Anderson
text: Converted our Figma design into a pixel-perfect WordPress website. Umer's attention to detail is outstanding. The result exceeded our expectations and helped increase our conversion rate significantly.
